name: context-engineering
description: Structured context injection pattern from Anthropic Context Engineering research. CLAUDE.md + AGENTS.md + SOUL.md = 14/14 task success vs 4.5/14 without.

capabilities.claude_md: Project-level instructions in CLAUDE.md — architecture, commands, conventions
capabilities.agents_md: Agent roster with roles, capabilities, security levels
capabilities.soul_md: Per-agent personality, goals, constraints — injected into system prompt
capabilities.shared_context: THESIS.md, OPERATOR.md, SIGNALS.md, FEEDBACK-LOG.md shared across agents
capabilities.context_budget: Constitution ~50 tokens to minimize context window usage

rules: Every agent MUST have a SOUL.md defining identity, goals, constraints
CLAUDE.md is the single source of truth for project conventions
Context injection order: System → Constitution → SOUL → Operator → Task
Keep injected context minimal — quality over quantity
Update context files when architecture changes (not stale docs)
